Use of VR: Not bad, but not good either.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing Dan. I'd be curious what you suggest that would be better than what we've done here. We feel we have done a great job of something new, easy to understand, intuitive and fun. Some game types lend themselves well to more traditional VR features like picking up objects and interacting with hands... and some just feel better with controllers and buttons. We're pushing the medium forward the most we can with use of full head and hand 6DOF controls to move and aim your character when most games would just use a thumb joystick for 2 axis of movement. I feel we're doing really well at pushing the genre forward, especially for the resources we're working with. But shooters are not for everyone, and you're welcome to your opinion. The more common First Person Shooters are particularly problematic in VR as so many new VR players have motion sickness problems with the most common implementation of movement controls, that's one of the reasons we decided to try something different. We're giving newer players a bridge between the simplest static VR experiences and the more intense FPS games that dominate VR. Thank you for the thoughts, Dan, I hope you'll come back to it some day and give it another chance.

reviews.review_description: It was a bit hard to reach some of the coin things but I like the mechanics and ides of the game also Think it was a bit too many enemy's at some points. So all in all fin and nice game bit hard at some points

developer_response.body: Thanks Xulnora. We just put out an update with an easy mode and more room scale options for those with less space, or just don't want to reach far. More to come.

reviews.review_title: Its alright. Not my type of game
reviews.review_description: Its fun but i don't like the gameplay that much. I can't really do much with a small room and it requires a decent armspace that i do not have atm.

developer_response.body: Fair enough, thanks for playing ToxiLOL. The default room scale is designed for about 2x2 meters to get the best out of it. We designed the game to get you moving. But we do have four room scale options and two of them are smaller than the default rooms space or for a more relaxed range of movement. There's also an extended reach upgrade on level 3.

reviews.review_description:
This is one of those easy to learn, hard to master games.
Vibrant graphics, simple controls and a good story. Still early days playing it, but is holding my attention well. Look forward to working through it all.

developer_response.body: Fantastic, thanks for the review. I hope you enjoy the rest.

reviews.review_description: Genuinely wasn't too interested in the game it was a lot like subway surfers in a way, kinda boring if u play it more and more, overall it has potential and has amazing graphics

developer_response.body: Thanks CalebFisk01. Subway Surfers looks like what I'd call a "lane switching" game, and I'm not a fan of those either. Thankfully our game offers significantly more than that. But thanks for your thoughts. It's good to get different perspectives.

reviews.review_title: I am one with the Phoenix
reviews.review_description: This game gets me to move with its controlling a flying phoenix grabbing powerups, shooting enemies, and dodging enemy rounds.  I really like how there is a toggle to swap your phoenix between fire and ice modes which let you absorb either the fire or ice bullets shot at you.  The toggle also swaps some objects in game to be solid or ethereal so you can fly through them.  When the game starts it requires some movement off your base to be able to grab distant power ups and dodge obstacles but after the brief (and good) tutorial you can go into settings to adjusts so you don't have to move so much if you have a small play area.  Also supports sitting which I like to have the option of in games.  Game is on rails and there is also a story which is a nice addition.  As you progress you unlock more enhancements.  One addition I would like is rather than being the set locked enhancements that instead I got to choose which enhancement was unlocked at each rank, to give me a bit of feeling of personalizing my playthrough.  Recommendation:  Thumbs up.

developer_response.body: Thank you Potatochip007, note taken. Perhaps in the sequel or a future update we can expand our upgrade path to give more choices. We have more options on their way in the next update.

reviews.review_description: This game, although was hard,  it was a good experience. The story i learned was good, the switching projectiles thing reminded me of the mechanic from super Mario 3D works, the boss fights were cool, and overall if ur a fan of the series or are looking for a fantasy type style game then this is right up ur alley

developer_response.body: Thank you Cheesey
